articles.title: Prediction markets have made betting easier than ever—and young men are paying the price
articles.summary: Young men are getting hooked on sports betting and prediction markets at unprecedented rates, racking up serious losses as mobile apps make wagering as simple as ordering food. This gambling surge threatens to poison the well for legitimate prediction markets, as regulators and lawmakers struggle to distinguish between casino-style betting apps and information aggregation platforms.

articles.title: ‘I’m still here 12 hours a day’: Luana Lopes Lara on building Kalshi as the world’s youngest female self-made billionaire
articles.summary: Luana Lopes Lara, co-founder of prediction market platform Kalshi, has become the world's youngest female self-made billionaire while maintaining a grueling 12-hour workday schedule. Her success validates that prediction markets have evolved from niche betting curiosity to legitimate billion-dollar infrastructure, potentially attracting more serious capital and mainstream adoption to the space.

articles.title: CFTC Jockeys With Congress, States for Prediction Market Primacy
articles.summary: The CFTC is battling Congress and state regulators for control over who gets to regulate prediction markets in the US. This turf war will determine whether prediction markets face a patchwork of conflicting state rules or get clearer federal oversight that could finally unlock mainstream adoption.

articles.title: Pile of Famous Athletes Quietly Invested in Kalshi Months Ago
articles.summary: A bunch of high-profile athletes dropped money into Kalshi before the prediction market platform became a household name. Smart money from sports stars suggests they saw the political betting boom coming before the rest of us caught on.

articles.title: Exclusive | White House Warns Staff Not to Place Bets on Prediction Markets Amid Iran War
articles.summary: The White House has reportedly issued internal warnings prohibiting staff from betting on prediction markets related to potential conflict with Iran. The move signals growing official recognition that prediction markets have become influential enough to warrant formal restrictions on government insiders who might possess material non-public information.

articles.title: 'We have a gambling epidemic': WA AG explains why the state is trying to ban Kalshi and other predictive markets
articles.summary: Washington's Attorney General is pushing to ban Kalshi and other prediction markets, calling them part of a broader "gambling epidemic" plaguing the state. The move signals how regulatory pressure is intensifying nationwide as prediction markets gain mainstream adoption, potentially setting a precedent for other states to follow suit.

articles.title: How Prediction Markets Turned the World Into a Casino
articles.summary: Prediction markets have exploded beyond politics and finance into everything from celebrity deaths to weather patterns, creating a global betting ecosystem where literally anything can become a tradeable outcome. This massive expansion means more liquidity and opportunities for sharp bettors, but also attracts casual gamblers who don't understand the fundamentals, potentially creating mispriced markets ripe for exploitation.

articles.title: Kalshi now controls 89% of the U.S. prediction market as regulated trading takes over
articles.summary: Kalshi has captured 89% of the U.S. prediction market share as regulated platforms squeeze out offshore competitors and gray-market operators. This regulatory moat positions Kalshi to define how Americans bet on politics and current events, potentially setting pricing standards and market norms for the entire industry.

articles.title: Judge denies Kalshi’s effort to stop Arizona criminal case as federal hurdle awaits
articles.summary: A judge rejected Kalshi's attempt to halt a criminal case in Arizona while the prediction market faces separate federal regulatory challenges. The legal battles could restrict Kalshi's ability to offer certain election betting markets, potentially driving more volume to offshore competitors like Polymarket.

articles.title: WATCH: Kalshi founders talk insider trading, gambling, Don Jr. on "The Axios Show"
articles.summary: Kalshi's founders appeared on "The Axios Show" to address controversies around insider trading allegations, gambling regulations, and Donald Trump Jr.'s involvement with the platform. The interview likely signals Kalshi's push to legitimize prediction markets amid regulatory scrutiny and public skepticism about whether these platforms are sophisticated forecasting tools or glorified betting sites.

articles.title: Kalshi NJ Court Win Puts Prediction Markets on Supreme Court Radar
articles.summary: Kalshi scored a legal victory in New Jersey court that's likely heading to the Supreme Court's attention. This win could establish crucial precedent for how prediction markets operate nationwide, potentially breaking open regulatory barriers that have kept the industry constrained.

articles.title: Lawmakers call for CFTC crackdown on prediction markets after bet on downed U.S. airmen
articles.summary: Lawmakers are demanding the CFTC crack down on prediction markets after someone placed bets on U.S. military personnel being shot down. This could trigger the regulatory hammer that prediction market operators have been dreading, especially if politicians decide these platforms have crossed from political speculation into tasteless exploitation of military casualties.
